qa_method.name: QA-canonical
qa_method.description: Canonical placeholder QA method used by ref-form benchmarks that share this design.
qa_method.observer_projection: Canonical QA primitives (b,e) with derived (d=b+e, a=b+2e).

calibration_provenance.procedure: canonical identity — no observer calibration parameters.

source_mapping.mapping_rationale: The canonical benchmark protocol binds QA-vs-baseline claims to declared baselines, parity, calibration provenance, and metrics.

sota_baseline.null_result_reason: Canonical placeholder protocol only; concrete benchmarks must provide a numeric SOTA threshold.

ablation.destroyed_structure: shuffle QA observer labels before scoring
ablation.expected_direction: claimed QA advantage should vanish under the ablation
